faqs.question: Is QR Shuttle really free?
faqs.answer: Yes, QR Shuttle is completely free to use. There are no hidden fees, premium features, or watermarks. You can generate unlimited QR codes without any restrictions.

faqs.question: Is my data safe?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All QR code generation happens directly in your browser. No data is uploaded to any server, ensuring complete privacy and security.

faqs.question: What QR code types are supported?
faqs.answer: QR Shuttle supports URL, Text, WiFi, vCard, Email, SMS, Phone, Location, and Event QR codes. Each type has specific input fields for easy generation.

faqs.question: Can I customize the QR code design?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can customize foreground and background colors, choose between square, dots, or rounded styles, adjust size, and even add a logo to the center of your QR code.

faqs.question: What formats can I export?
faqs.answer: You can export QR codes in PNG, SVG, or JPG formats. PNG is best for web use, SVG for scalability, and JPG for smaller file sizes.

faqs.question: Do I need to create an account?
faqs.answer: No, QR Shuttle requires no registration or account creation. Simply visit the website and start generating QR codes immediately.

faqs.question: Can I use QR codes commercially?
faqs.answer: Yes, all QR codes generated are free for personal and commercial use. There are no restrictions on how you use them.

faqs.question: How do WiFi QR codes work?
faqs.answer: WiFi QR codes contain network credentials. When scanned, devices can automatically connect to the WiFi network without manually entering the password.

faqs.question: What is error correction level?
faqs.answer: Error correction determines how much of the QR code can be damaged while still being readable. Higher levels (H=30%) are better for codes with logos, while lower levels (L=7%) create smaller codes.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.content: QR Shuttle does not collect any personal data. All QR code generation happens entirely in your browser. We do not have access to the content you encode, your IP address, or any other identifying information.

dataUsage.title: Data Usage
dataUsage.content: Since we don't collect any data, we don't use, share, or sell any information. Our service operates entirely client-side, ensuring complete privacy.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: Your data security is guaranteed because your data never leaves your device. All processing happens locally in your web browser using JavaScript. No server-side processing occurs.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: We use Cloudflare for content delivery and hosting. No user data is shared with Cloudflare beyond standard web server logs. We do not use analytics, tracking cookies, or advertising networks.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.content: Since we don't collect personal data, there's no data to access, modify, or delete. You have complete control over your information at all times.

changes.title: Policy Changes
changes.content: We may update this privacy policy occasionally. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at support@shuttlelab.org

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Terms and conditions for using QR Shuttle

service.title: Service Description
service.content: QR Shuttle is a free online QR code generator that allows users to create QR codes for various purposes including URLs, WiFi credentials, contact information, and more. The service is provided as-is without warranties.

license.title: Usage License
license.content: You are granted a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use QR Shuttle for personal and commercial purposes. You may not modify, distribute, or reverse-engineer the service.

limitations.title: Limitation of Liability
limitations.content: QR Shuttle is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of this service, including but not limited to direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: The QR codes you generate are your property. QR Shuttle retains no rights to the content you encode. The service itself, including design, code, and documentation, is protected by copyright.

changes.title: Terms Changes
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of any changes.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.content: For questions about these terms, please contact support@shuttlelab.org
